steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “to approach college with appropriate consideration, to form a workable personality to take along” shows that consideration is something you bring to an experience — a mental state or approach you adopt.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Reflection is the target meaning. C) Reflection fits because it's the thoughtful state of mind you “approach college with” when you're preparing yourself. Admiration, indecision, and kindness don't fit this context. That matches choice C — C is correct.
